name: salesforce-superpowers
description: Unified Salesforce development, architecture, trust gates, memory, Graphify knowledge graphs, multi-agent design, planning, TDD, debugging, review, and delivery workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Salesforce, Superpowers, and Graphify workflows in one plugin
interface.longDescription: Use Salesforce Superpowers for Salesforce architecture, Apex, LWC, Flow, integrations, security, deployment, memory, trust gates, source checks, low-token answers, Graphify knowledge graphs, GraphRAG JSON, multi-agent design, planning, TDD, systematic debugging, code review, and delivery workflows.
defaultPrompt: Use Salesforce Superpowers to solve this Salesforce development task with compact, trustworthy guidance.
Plan and implement this Salesforce change using TDD, safe-change checks, and verification.
Build a Graphify knowledge graph for this Salesforce codebase or document set.
